sections.paragraph:
εἴδωλον, ου, τό [εἶδος]

—1. ‘a representation or symbol of a worshipped entity’, cultic image, idol Ac 7:41; Rv 9:20.

—2. by metonymy ‘someth. viewed as a transcendent entity and identified with its material representation’, imaged deity, idol Ac 15:20; Ro 2:22; 1 Cor 10:19; 1 Th 1:9; 1 J 5:21.
